title: Aether II Plus
description: Experience The Aether II alpha smoothly! A modpack with better FPS, shaders, and essential QoL mods.
body: # 📖 About A lightweight pack built for anyone looking to dive into The Aether II public alpha without the headache. I’ve bundled in essential QoL fixes and performance boosts to keep things smooth. # 📒 Features ### Performance Improvements Experience up to 4x higher framerates! It's perfectly optimized for low-end systems, though performance improvements will vary depending on your hardware. ![Performance Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a71b30e12f9f88209a81a1c21505215c55343ef4.png) --- ### Pre-Installed Shaders I’ve pre-installed 9 different shaders so you can find the perfect look for your world immediately. From high-performance packs for low-end PCs to lush, vibrant visuals, there’s something in here for every setup. Just jump in and find your favorite! ![Shader showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/286b1c0d6a700ecfabbe571a343076e810ecd59f.webp) --- ### Minimap Includes a high-performance minimap for easy navigation. Perfect for marking your base, finding dungeons, or just seeing what’s over the next floating island. ![Minimap Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72812e446e435402ae73f960c31e20c644af6734.webp) --- ### What is this block/Mob? The Jade mod will show you what are you looking at. Perfect for first time playing. ![Example Of Jade Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29487ecf17bbcb07f438b17cdab71ca0700a400b.png) --- ### Is this edible? The appleskin mod shows you if item can be eaten and how much hunger it adds. ![Food Nutrition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5987078d61725cfd7427dce9f57ccfa37182722a.png) --- ### View Recipe The JEI mod allow you to view recipes. Support modded recipes. ![Jei example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46d5c2b4b6c4746905bccd45bfba61454026eea.png) --- # 🔍 Learn about The Aether II mod. > Video not made by me. # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host! Setting up a server through them is the absolute best way to support us right now. Don't just take our word for it—read the community reviews here: [Best Minecraft Server Hosting.](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftServer/comments/1i1zl4s/best_minecraft_server_hosting/) 👉 Click the image below or use this link: [Godlike Host](https://affiliate.godlike.host/jessdX) to get 50% off your first month! --- # 🧾Credits & Notice NOT AN OFFICIAL The Aether Project PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH The Aether Project The Banner is edited version of the original banner made by The Aether Project. The linked video was NOT made by me. Shaders used in screenshots are Bliss.
